metadata.name: Smart Setup
metadata.description: Interactive setup guide template with vibe selection buttons.

channels.name: 🚀-get-started
channels.topic: Select and deploy your server template
channels.initialMessage:
👋 **Welcome! Let's build your server.**

Choose a template below to automatically configure your channels and roles. 

**Select a Vibe:**
🎮 **Gaming** - Squads, Clips, and Live Streams.
💻 **Developer** - Projects, Code-Help, and Career.
🏠 **Friends** - Casual chat and Media dumps.

*Click a button below to begin installation.*
